items.title: Trump's envoys Witkoff and Kushner to fly to Pakistan for Iran talks
items.dek: Iran says its Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is already in Pakistan but that there is no meeting planned between Iran and the US.
items.body: Iran says its Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is already in Pakistan but that there is no meeting planned between Iran and the US.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Why is this game only legal across Australia one day a year?
items.dek: Two-up is a coin toss betting game that was played by Australian soldiers during World War One - it’s now only legal across Australia on 25 April.
items.body: Two-up is a coin toss betting game that was played by Australian soldiers during World War One - it’s now only legal across Australia on 25 April.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Three Kosovo Serbs jailed over deadly gun battle and monastery siege
items.dek: Kosovo's court sentences two men to life imprisonment and another to a 30-year term for the 2023 attack.
items.body: Kosovo's court sentences two men to life imprisonment and another to a 30-year term for the 2023 attack.
items.author: IriLine Desk
